name: Montana Capital Car Title Loans
description_short: Los Angeles, CA location of Montana Capital Car Title Loans at 1002 N Vermont Ave offers car title loans Mon-Fri 9AM-7PM, Sat 10AM-4PM.
description_long:
Montana Capital Car Title Loans operates a storefront at 1002 N Vermont Ave in Los Angeles, CA, conveniently located for residents across the city seeking quick access to title loans. The Los Angeles location maintains extended hours throughout the week, operating Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM and Saturday from 10AM to 4PM, making it easy to visit during your schedule.

This Los Angeles branch specializes in car title loans, providing fast funding against your vehicle's title. Whether you need funds for an unexpected expense or emergency, the team at the 1002 N Vermont Ave location in Los Angeles is available to discuss your options and process your application. Call +1 323-676-0494 to speak directly with staff about your specific situation.

For Los Angeles residents with a vehicle and immediate cash needs, a title loan provides a fast solution without lengthy approval processes. Bring your vehicle title, a valid ID, and proof of residency to the 1002 N Vermont Ave location. Montana Capital Car Title Loans handles the application process efficiently and can explain all available options.
address: 1002 N Vermont Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90029

company_info.headquarters: 1002 N Vermont Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90029

pros: Same-day or next-day funding available with quick pre-approval in under 5 minutes
No credit check required; serves customers with bad credit and bankruptcy history
Borrowers keep their vehicle and keys during the loan term while making payments
Loan amounts up to $50,000, significantly higher than typical payday loan limits
24/7 online application access with no application fees
Positive customer reviews (4.5/5 Google rating) citing fast processing and professional service
Competitive rates compared to other title loan providers per customer feedback
cons: Title loans are high-cost products with significant interest rates and fees not disclosed on the website
Vehicle is used as collateral, creating repossession risk if borrower defaults
Funds delivered as checks (Bank of America) rather than cash, despite marketing language emphasizing 'cash'
Website does not clearly disclose APR, fees, or default consequences, limiting transparency
Product targets vulnerable consumers (poor credit, financial emergencies) who may not fully understand long-term debt obligations
best_for: Individuals with poor or no credit who need emergency cash within 24 hours and own a vehicle with equity
Borrowers facing temporary cash shortfalls who can reliably repay within a short timeframe and want to avoid collateral loss
People with bankruptcy history who cannot qualify for unsecured personal loans or credit cards
Vehicle owners seeking higher loan amounts ($10K–$50K) than available through payday loans
diagnosis: Montana Capital is best suited for vehicle owners with poor credit facing genuine short-term cash emergencies who can reliably repay within months. The critical caveat is that title loans are high-cost products with significant interest and fees; borrowers risk vehicle repossession if unable to repay, and the website's lack of APR/fee transparency obscures the true cost of borrowing. This product should be a last resort after exploring payday alternatives, credit union loans, or employer advances.
services: Free pre-approval in under 5 minutes with no credit impact
Same-day or next-day fund disbursement via direct deposit or in-person pickup
No credit check or credit score inquiry required
Ability to keep vehicle and keys during loan repayment period
Title return upon final loan payment
Simple loan payoff process with courtesy text reminders
In-person service at multiple locations (implied by location pickup option)
meta_description: Montana Capital Car Title Loans at 1002 N Vermont Ave, Los Angeles, CA. Fast car title loans, open Mon-Fri 9AM-7PM, Sat 10AM-4PM.
